```json
}
```

```json
}
```

execution_note: claude -p --model haiku (Claude Code CLI, non-bare, OAuth) 30 sequential isolated subprocess calls from a directory with no CLAUDE.md/.claude. --disallowedTools blocked all built-in tools. --append-system-prompt requested fence-free output but the model ignored it (30/30 wrapped in ```json fences regardless) -- raw_response preserved exactly as returned, unmodified.
